ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wikisurveys" (
  "wikisurvey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wikisurvey */,
  "wikisurvey_name" TEXT /* Name of the wikisurvey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wikisurvey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wikisurvey was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity in the wikisurvey */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the wikisurvey is active */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the wikisurvey belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the wikisurvey */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the wikisurvey */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the wikisurvey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the wikisurvey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the wikisurvey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wikisurvey (e.g., draft, active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wikisurvey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ideas" (
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each idea */,
  "wikisurvey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wikisurvey the idea belongs to */,
  "idea_text" TEXT /* Text of the idea */,
  "user_submitted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the idea was submitted by a user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the idea was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity for the idea */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the idea is active */,
  "info" TEXT /* Additional information about the idea (optional) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the idea belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the idea */,
  "parent_idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent idea (for hierarchical ideas) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the idea */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the idea */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the idea */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_parent_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES idea_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_wikisurvey_id FOREIGN KEY ("wikisurvey_id") REFERENCES wikisurveys ("wikisurvey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_user_submitted FOREIGN KEY ("user_submitted") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "idea_id_left" INTEGER /* ID of the idea on the left side of the interaction */,
  "idea_id_right" INTEGER /* ID of the idea on the right side of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., win, loss, undecided) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was recorded */,
  "interaction_type_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the interaction type */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_interactions_idea_id_left FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id_left") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_interactions_idea_id_right FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id_right") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_scores" (
  "idea_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "score" REAL /* Calculated score of the idea */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was last calculated */,
  "score_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score */,
  "score_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idea_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_scores_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance entry */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "appearances_on_left" INTEGER /* Number of times the idea appeared on the left */,
  "appearances_on_right" INTEGER /* Number of times the idea appeared on the right */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions involving the idea */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_appearances_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_wins" (
  "win_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each win entry */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the idea */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("win_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_wins_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss entry */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the idea */,
  "loss_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_losses_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_undecideds" (
  "undecided_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each undecided entry */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "undecided_count" INTEGER /* Number of times users were undecided for the idea */,
  "undecided_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of undecideds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("undecided_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idea_undecideds_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity by the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked out */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the content */,
  "wikisurvey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wikisurvey accessed */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, submit, edit) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_wikisurvey_id FOREIGN KEY ("wikisurvey_id") REFERENCES wikisurveys ("wikisurvey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wikisurvey_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wikisurvey_ideas" (
  "wikisurvey_idea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wikisurvey-idea association */,
  "wikisurvey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wikisurvey */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wikisurvey_idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wikisurvey_ideas_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wikisurvey_ideas_wikisurvey_id FOREIGN KEY ("wikisurvey_id") REFERENCES wikisurveys ("wikisurvey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idea_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ideas_categories" (
  "idea_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each idea-category association */,
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idea_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES idea_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_categories_idea_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_id") REFERENCES ideas ("idea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
